steps.t: The vineyard is north of Rosa Brockhouse on Northcotton Farm. Rosa Brockhouse asked you to help her make jam for her pies. The first step is to gather…
The crushing tubs are next to the vineyard at the Northcotton Farm. The grapes need to be crushed in the tubs before they can be turned into jam.
You were told that by <rgb=#FF0000>dancing</rgb> on the grapes in the tubs, you could crush them effectively. The grapes are in tubs by th…
The crushed grapes need to be collected from the tub.
Theobald Longfurrow is next to the vineyards on Northcotton Farm. Theobald Longfurrow will help you turn your crushed grapes into jam.
Rosa Brockhouse is south of the vineyards on the Northcotton Farm. Rosa Brockhouse will want to get the jam put into the pie.
